jobs.name: Daily Morning Briefing
jobs.message: Run the daily briefing for James: ARM stock price, top tech news from HN and ARM newsroom RSS feeds, weather in San Francisco, and anything pending in memory. Be concise — 5-8 bullet points.

jobs.name: Saturday Surf Check
jobs.message: Check surf conditions at Pacifica/Lindamar beach for tomorrow Sunday. Use web_search to get the surf forecast. Then send a Telegram message to James with a brief Sunday surf report: wave height, wind, swell period, and whether it's worth going out.

jobs.name: Monday Wirecutter Deals
jobs.message: Use the wirecutter_deals skill: search Wirecutter for current top deals on consumer electronics, computing, audio/video, and smart home. Filter for items under $500. Send James an email summary of the top 5-7 deals with links.
